relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/241104 2D immunofluorescence for cytospinned slides.docx
full_text:
Cytospin Slide Immunofluorescence 241104

Fixation and storage

Cytosplin cells on the slides 1300 rpm 5 minutes.

Fix for 15 minutes in 4 % PFA-PBS in RT

Remove PFA, and wash the wells three times with PBS. Submerge slides in PBS for storage

Staining

Permeabilize with 0.1 % Triton X100 - PBS for 10 minutes in RT

Wash once with PBS

Block in 1 % FBS-PBS, incubate at RT for 30 minutes.

Remove blocking buffer and add a droplet of antibody cocktail diluted in blocking buffer. Incubate for 1 hour in RT in a humidified chamber.

Incubate 0.1 µg/ml DAPI, diluted in PBS for 5 minutes

Wash thrice with PBS

Mount in a 20 µl drop of Vectashield, seal the slides with Eukitt. Can be imaged with Lola after Eukitt has hardened

488: aSMA 1:100 ab202295 -20 box 4 slot E1-E5

555: CK7 1:400 ab209601 -20 box 4 slot F1-F5/F6-F12

647: CD45 1:100 304081 +4 box 1 slot A3
